title: Appointment and qualifications
doc_html:
§1563. Appointment and qualifications

            The state chief procurement officer shall be in the classified service of the state and shall be appointed in accordance with the provisions of Article X, Section 7 of the Louisiana Constitution of 1974. The state chief procurement officer shall have had a minimum of eight years experience in the large scale procurement of supplies, services, or personal, professional, consulting, or social services, involving specification development, the preparation of bid proposals and bid evaluation and award, including at least three years of supervisory experience. Preference shall be given to such experience in governmental purchasing.

            Added by Acts 1979, No. 715, §1, eff. July 1, 1980; Acts 2014, No. 864, §2, eff. Jan. 1, 2015.
doc_text:
§1563.  Appointment and qualifications
The state chief procurement officer shall be in the classified service of the state and
shall be appointed in accordance with the provisions of Article X, Section 7 of the Louisiana
Constitution of 1974.  The state chief procurement officer shall have had a minimum of eight
years experience in the large scale procurement of supplies, services, or personal,
professional, consulting, or social services, involving specification development, the
preparation of bid proposals and bid evaluation and award, including at least three years of
supervisory experience.  Preference shall be given to such experience in governmental
purchasing.
Added by Acts 1979, No. 715, §1, eff. July 1, 1980; Acts 2014, No. 864, §2, eff. Jan.
1, 2015.
